scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix ../Backend/shared install && npm --prefix ../Backend/shared run build && npm --prefix ../Backend install && npm --prefix ../Frontend install
scripts.dev: npm --prefix ../Backend/shared run build && concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm --prefix ../Frontend run dev" "npm --prefix ../Backend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix ../Backend/shared run build && npm --prefix ../Backend run build && npm --prefix ../Frontend run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix ../Backend/shared run lint && npm --prefix ../Backend run lint && npm --prefix ../Frontend run lint
scripts.test: npm --prefix ../Backend/shared run build && npm --prefix ../Backend/shared run test && npm --prefix ../Backend run test && npm --prefix ../Frontend run test
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix ../Backend/shared run typecheck && npm --prefix ../Backend/shared run build && npm --prefix ../Backend run typecheck && npm --prefix ../Frontend run typecheck
